mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, author, create_time, update_time, user_id FROM article ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, content, author, user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{author}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
